description: Obsolete MAT-managed paths in adopted repos — successor surfaces and safe handling modes.

handling_modes.auto_remove: Remove only when file bytes match a listed fingerprint (sha256 hex of exact content). Never removes without a match.
handling_modes.backup_then_remove: Fingerprint match: copy under legacy quarantine then remove. Customized content: copy to quarantine prefixed as customized-* and leave the original in place.
handling_modes.warn_only: Never delete; append decision to audit JSONL and print stderr when the path exists.

fingerprint_provenance.note: Union of every distinct blob from git log aefa9f7^ -- .cursor/commands/plan_w_team.md in this MAT repo, plus regression stub 2c5a1aaf04355ff3f0d8bb9f25d5b023ecceabd5e32f27d141ab978cd529d7fa from tests/test_mat_legacy_integration.py.

entries.notes: Historical underscore-named stub superseded by mat-plan-team.md. Fingerprints are SHA256 of exact bytes ever committed to this MAT repo for this path on `git log aefa9f7^ -- <path>` (pre mat-* rename), plus the documented test/stub bytes for plan_w_team.
Possible alternate legacy filename; no canonical fingerprint — operator review only.
